status.description: Self-reported readiness category. Must be consistent with blockers/missing/clarification_questions

requested_input.description: What the user/system must provide to clear the blocker

evidence_from_prompt.description: Short quote (<=25 words) from the prompt/context supporting this blocker, or 'NOT PROVIDED' if absent

items.description: A single blocker preventing execution. Each blocker carries a normalized code, detail, what is needed to unblock, and an evidence quote from the prompt.

blockers.description: Hard blockers preventing execution now. Leave empty if none

needed.description: Name of the missing input (e.g., 'acceptance criteria')

why.description: Why it is needed to proceed safely/correctly

evidence_from_prompt.description: Short quote (<=25 words) from the prompt/context showing it is missing, or 'NOT PROVIDED'

items.description: A concrete missing input required to implement correctly (even if not a hard blocker).

missing_information.description: Concrete missing inputs required to implement correctly (even if not a hard blocker)

clarification_questions.description: Questions to resolve ambiguity or fill missing information. Keep concise

evidence_from_prompt.description: Short quote from the prompt/context showing the contradiction

items.description: A conflict detected within requirements or constraints.

contradictions.description: Conflicts detected within requirements or constraints

impact.description: Potential impact if the assumption is wrong

evidence_from_prompt.description: Short quote supporting the assumption, or 'INFERRED' if not explicitly stated

items.description: An assumption made to proceed. Each must include an evidence note ('INFERRED' allowed).

assumptions.description: Any assumptions made to proceed. Each must include an evidence note ('INFERRED' allowed)

uncertainty_areas.description: Areas that remain uncertain after analysis (not necessarily blocking)

evidence_quotes.description: A small set of short, direct quotes from the prompt/context used as evidence (<=25 words each)

proposed_deliverables.description: Concrete deliverables that will be produced if proceeding (files, artifacts, outputs). Empty if cannot proceed

changed_files.description: Repo-relative file paths actually modified/created during this step. Empty if none

description: Quality telemetry metadata for flow control and auditability. The CLI quality gate evaluates these fields deterministically to decide whether the ceremony can proceed, needs HITL intervention, or must stop.
